message:
fix(node): length-prefix payload and mmr_proof in TrustRecord::digest to prevent hash collisions

Without length prefixes, payload bytes and proof hashes could be
confused (e.g., payload=[0u8;35]+proof=[] hashes same as
payload=[0u8;3]+proof=[[0u8;32]]).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
